module comparator_16bit (
    input [15:0] A,
    input [15:0] B,
    output reg A_greater,
    output reg A_equal,
    output reg A_less
);
    always @(*) begin
        A_greater = (A > B);
        A_equal = (A == B);
        A_less = (A < B);
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
